title: Entity Jump Around Target Behavior
description: Allows an entity to jump around a target.

check_collision.title: Check Collision
check_collision.description: Enables collision checks when calculating the jump. Setting check_collision to true may affect performance and should be used with care.

entity_bounding_box_scale.title: Entity Bounding Box Scale
entity_bounding_box_scale.description:
Scaling temporarily applied to the entity's AABB bounds when jumping. A smaller bounding box reduces the risk of collisions during the jump. When check_collision is true it also increases the chance of being able to jump when close to obstacles.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.7

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

Properties:
• domain (object)
• operator (object)
• subject (object)
• test (string)
• value (object)

Sample values:
• breeze: {"all_of":[{"any_of":[{"test":"in_water","value...

jump_angles.title: Jump Angles
jump_angles.description:
The jump angles in float degrees that are allowed when performing the jump. The order in which the angles are chosen is randomized.

Sample values:
• breeze: [40,55,60,75,80]

jump_cooldown_duration.title: Jump Cooldown Duration
jump_cooldown_duration.description:
The time in seconds to spend in cooldown before this goal can be used again.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.5

jump_cooldown_when_hurt_duration.title: Jump Cooldown When Hurt Duration
jump_cooldown_when_hurt_duration.description:
The time in seconds to spend in cooldown after being hurt before this goal can be used again.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.1

landing_distance_from_target.title: Landing Distance From Target
landing_distance_from_target.description:
The range deciding how close to and how far away from the target the landing position can be when jumping.

Properties:
• max (float) = 0
• min (float) = 0

Sample values:
• breeze: [4,8]

landing_position_spread_degrees.title: Landing Position Spread Degrees
landing_position_spread_degrees.description:
This angle (in degrees) is used for controlling the spread when picking a landing position behind the target. A zero spread angle means the landing position will be straight behind the target with no variance. A 90 degree spread angle means the landing position can be up to 45 degrees to the left and to the right of the position straight behind the target's view direction.

Sample values:
• breeze: 90

last_hurt_duration.title: Last Hurt Duration
last_hurt_duration.description:
If the entity was hurt within these last seconds, the jump_cooldown_when_hurt_duration will be used instead of jump_cooldown_duration.

Sample values:
• breeze: 2

line_of_sight_obstruction_height_ignore.title: Line Of Sight Obstruction Height Ignore
line_of_sight_obstruction_height_ignore.description:
If the entity's line of sight towards its target is obstructed by an obstacle with a height below this number, the obstacle will be ignored, and the goal will try to find a valid landing position.

Sample values:
• breeze: 4

max_jump_velocity.title: Max Jump Velocity
max_jump_velocity.description:
Maximum velocity a jump can be performed at.

Sample values:
• breeze: 1.4

prepare_jump_duration.title: Prepare Jump Duration
prepare_jump_duration.description:
The time in seconds to spend preparing for the jump.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.5

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• breeze: 5

required_vertical_space.title: Required Vertical Space
required_vertical_space.description:
The number of blocks above the entity's head that has to be air for this goal to be usable.

Sample values:
• breeze: 4

snap_to_surface_block_range.title: Snap To Surface Block Range
snap_to_surface_block_range.description:
The number of blocks above and below from the jump target position that will be checked to find a surface to land on.

Sample values:
• breeze: 10

valid_distance_to_target.title: Valid Distance To Target
valid_distance_to_target.description:
Target needs to be within this range for the jump to happen.

Properties:
• max (float) = 0
• min (float) = 0

Sample values:
• breeze: [4,20]
